title: neltuma hassleri var. nigroides
intro: Neltuma hassleri var. nigroides, also known as the Black Neltuma, is a variety of flowering plant native to Central and South America, belonging to the Neltuma genus within the Solanaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Neltuma hassleri var. nigroides include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve congestion, and promote a healthy immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in decoctions, with some also using it as a tincture or adding it to salves for topical application.
